title: galium erectum var. rigidum
intro: Galium erectum var. rigidum, also known as stiff marsh bedstraw, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of stiff marsh bedstraw include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
